meta.homeTitle: Link x Link — Connect with local people on WhatsApp
meta.homeDescription: Discover profiles of people near you and contact them directly on WhatsApp. No sign-up, no hassle.
meta.appDescription: Browse local people profiles and contact them directly on WhatsApp.

landing.description: Discover profiles of people near you and contact them directly on <wa>WhatsApp</wa>. No sign-up, no hassle.
landing.benefit1Text: Real people from your area, with photos and description.
landing.benefit2Text: One tap opens WhatsApp. No middleman chats.
landing.how1: Enter the app and swipe through profiles.
landing.how2: Interested in someone? Tap the WhatsApp button.
landing.how3: Something wrong? Report it and help the community.
landing.acceptTerms: I accept the <eula>terms and conditions</eula>, the <privacy>privacy policy</privacy> and the <data>data usage policy</data>

feed.error: Could not load profiles. Check your connection.

swaps.warning: You have made {{count}} interactions today. Opening too many new chats may get your number temporarily blocked by WhatsApp.
swaps.limitReached: You reached the limit of {{max}} interactions in 24 hours. Come back later.

report.title: Report profile
report.success: Report sent. Thanks for helping the community.
report.error: Could not send the report. Please try again.
